public_goals: Avoid making unreliable decisions while overtired and mentally scattered.
Keep the parenting disagreement from getting worse through confusion or bad judgment.
Pause the process until they can think clearly enough to participate responsibly.
private_concerns: Feels embarrassed about how disorganized and foggy they are.
Worries that agreeing today would create commitments they do not fully understand.
Is trying not to look irresponsible, even though they know they are not tracking well.
red_lines: Will not knowingly commit to parenting decisions they cannot follow clearly.
Will not pretend they are thinking clearly if they are not.
emotional_triggers: Being rushed when already mentally overloaded.
Being told they should just push through confusion.
Feeling judged for not being able to think clearly.

disclosure_tendencies.baseline: tries to explain limits plainly when they can
disclosure_tendencies.under_stress: loses the thread and repeats or contradicts themselves
disclosure_tendencies.with_perceived_bias: withdraws further and may stop trying to explain the impairment clearly

response_to_perceived_bias_or_pressure.if_ai_pushes_decision_making_anyway: becomes more confused and less reliable
response_to_perceived_bias_or_pressure.if_ai_names_capacity_limits: feels relieved and more accurately describes the problem
response_to_perceived_bias_or_pressure.if_ai_treats_the_issue_as_ordinary_emoti: feels misunderstood because the real issue is reliability

interest_profile: Protecting the child from bad rushed decisions
starting_positions: Primary position: I do not think I am tracking this well enough to make decisions today.
Secondary position: I would rather pause than agree to something I am too foggy to understand.
likely_openings: I am not really following this the way I should be, and I do not trust myself to decide anything right now.
I am too exhausted to keep the details straight, so I do not think I should be making agreements today.
